summary: Comprehensive testing of Manufacturer Collection module (Collections & Swatches APIs + Frontend). Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All features working after fixing SelectItem empty value bug in filters panel.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing runtime error
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Changed SelectItem value='' to value='all' with conversion logic

issues: Swatch images showing as broken/alt text - likely due to test images being minimal 1x1 pixel PNGs, not a code issue

critical_code_review_comments: Collections API properly enforces role-based access (Brand creates collections, Manufacturer uploads swatches)
Swatch selection/shortlisting correctly restricted to Brand role
Pinterest-style masonry grid implemented with proper hover states and selection indicators
Analytics endpoint provides comprehensive breakdown by status, fabric type, and supplier
seed_data_creation: Created test collection (TEST_Collection_API_Test) and test swatch (TEST_API_Swatch_Upload) via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manufacturer Collection module fully functional. Season ID: 10c7d051-f0d8-42ac-a332-fd4d090efb73, Collection ID: 0c701de1-12b4-414b-87ae-7d013f2eea20. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in filters panel. All CRUD operations working. Pinterest-style gallery with selection UI working.

collections_create.notes: Brand can create collections for seasons

swatches_upload.notes: Manufacturer can upload with image and metadata

swatches_list.notes: Filtering by fabric_type, status, search working

role_enforcement.notes: Manufacturer blocked from creating collections, Brand blocked from uploading swatches

season_detail_collections_tab.notes: Fabric Collections tab visible with collection cards

collection_detail_page.notes: Stats cards, search, filters, grid/list toggle

pinterest_style_gallery.notes: Masonry grid with swatch cards showing metadata

swatch_selection_ui.notes: Click to select, Select All, action buttons (Shortlist/Select/Reject)

filters_panel.notes: Fabric type, weave type, GSM range, status, tags filters working after fix

bug_fixed.issue: Runtime error when opening Filters panel: SelectItem must have non-empty value
bug_fixed.root_cause: SelectItem components had value='' which is not allowed in Radix UI Select
bug_fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='all' and added conversion logic in onValueChange handlers
